description: DESIGN STUB (G3: Entity Directory) — Per-tenant directory of organizational entities (Ministry / CSREP / PEC / Municipality, etc.) each with parent-linkage and boundary references. Backs workflow assignment resolution and the BRD `Related Institution / Public Service` field. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — this schema reserves the code so future implementation can register data without re-doing the schema envelope. See docs/g-phases/g3-entity-directory.md for the full design; final property shape lands in the implementation PR.
DESIGN STUB (G3: Entity Directory) — Lighter registry of Economic Agents for the IGSAE path (BRD §5.2). NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — reserves the schema code. See docs/g-phases/g3-entity-directory.md.

DESIGN STUB (G3: Entity Directory) — Read-only projection from HRMS keyed by entityCode, listing current Case Manager + Supervisor employee IDs. Editor writes through to HRMS; this projection exists for list-view performance. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — reserves the schema code. See docs/g-phases/g3-entity-directory.md.
